name: Prince Primavera Seafood Salad
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Can ripe pitted olives, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook PRINCE ROTINI PRIMAVERA until al dente, drain and cool.
2. Drain artichoke hearts and halve the peppers. Drain olives.
3. Add shrimp, scallops, drained peppers, and olives to pasta.
4. In a blender, combine olive oil, vinegar, anchovies, crushed garlic,
basil leaves, salt, and pepper to taste. Blend until smooth.
5. Gradually add PRINCE PARMESAN CHEESE to the mixture while blending.
6. Taste the dressing (it should have a slightly tart flavor).
7. Toss the salad dressing into the pasta mixture.
